metadata.source: Follow-up from Live Register v1 first slice.

title: Define live register retention and Chronik export
goal: Define retention, redaction and optional Chronik export for live-register events so Bureau does not become an unbounded chat memory store.

acceptance.assertion: Retention classes and cleanup/export rules are documented.
Chronik export is optional, redacted and source-bound.
The policy states that Live Register is operational evidence, not general memory.
